name: @dorkos/flow-engine
description: Build-only authoring home for the /flow engine: the Zod config schema plus the work-item model, calibration ladder, dispatch policy, gates, recovery, and evidence selection. Imported by nothing at runtime; the oracles compile to dependency-free scripts in .agents/flow/scripts/ (ADR-0294). Lives under .agents/flow so it ships with the plugin from one canonical source.
